message:
feat(demo-showcase): visual effects improvements and concurrent session updates

Visual Effects (visual_effects.rs):
- Enhanced effect rendering with better animation timing
- Improved effect transitions and state management

App/CLI/Main:
- Minor updates for screen navigation
- CLI improvements for demo options

Visual Effects PTY Test:
- Updated test expectations for visual effects screen

These changes were coordinated across multiple concurrent agent sessions.
